<!-- Thanks for sending a PR! A short description of what changed and why is plenty. -->

## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Why

<!-- The problem being solved or the user-visible behavior being added. Link the issue if there is one (`Closes #123`). -->

## Screenshots / clips

<!-- For UI changes, paste a before/after screenshot or short clip. The reviewer can't otherwise tell whether your change looks right. Delete this section for non-UI PRs. -->

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? At minimum: `cd app && npm run verify` passed and you exercised the affected screen in a real browser. List anything else you checked (e.g. specific routes, AI providers, edge cases). -->

- [ ] `cd app && npm run verify` passes
- [ ] Manually verified in browser
- [ ]

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything not obvious from the diff: tradeoffs you considered, things you punted, follow-ups that should be tracked separately. -->
